creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Gerard Seibert from comment #212)
GPL'ed or any other BSD-incompatible-licensed drivers can live in ports. :-)
But TB driver would be tricky, as it would have TB mode and already-existing XHCI mode.

The best way is that Intel provides TB driver with BSD-compatible license.
(Or original author of Linux TB driver, if any, kindly make it dual (or more) license including BSD-compatible one. So someone can port it in-kernel.
